mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supplement_invitation WHERE candidate_id = #{candidateId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC
SELECT * FROM supplement_invitation WHERE push_id = #{pushId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC
SELECT * FROM supplement_invitation WHERE school_id = #{schoolId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC
SELECT * FROM supplement_invitation WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY sent_at DESC
SELECT * FROM supplement_invitation WHERE candidate_id = #{candidateId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 1
